critical_findings.description: Webview panel with scripts enabled (potential C2 channel)

medium_findings.code_snippet: const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('chatixiaPage', page.title, vscode.ViewColumn.One, { enableScripts: true, localResourceRoots: [assetsPath] });
const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('chatixiaDashboard', 'Career Growth Dashboard', vscode.ViewColumn.One, { localResourceRoots: [assetsPath] });

medium_findings.description: Publisher domain is NOT verified by Microsoft

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
